programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats
programme.desc: The Griffins get a nanny for the kids, courtesy of Lois' parents, which gives Peter and Lois the opportunity to reconnect.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money
programme.desc: After Chris gets a special one-dollar bill for his birthday and quickly loses it, the dollar gets passed from character to character throughout Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School
programme.desc: Homer joins the 'Springfield Preppers,' an off-the-grid survivalist group whose leader has set up a top-secret retreat outside of town to prepare for the end of the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Test Before Trying
programme.desc: When Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure because of low standardized test scores, the fate of the school rests in the hands of the one student who missed the test, and who must raise the average above the minimum threshold: Bart Simpson.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Changing of the Guardian
programme.desc: After surviving a tornado, Marge and Homer seek out guardians for the kids, in case the worst should happen. They first turn to friends and family, including Homer's half-brother.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Splintered Thing
programme.desc: Bart's heart strings are pulled once again when Mary Spuckler returns to Springfield. But his failure to pay her enough attention strains their relationship.

programme.desc: Lasalle hopes to avenge his brother's murder by tracking a drug ring in Alabama he believes is responsible. Also, when Pride assists with the case, he crosses paths with Eddie Barrett, an elusive individual who knows more than he is sharing.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Boom-Boom-Boom-Boom

programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, he begins to regret his impulsiveness and seeks counsel from Martin and Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Ask Me No Questions
programme.desc: Niles wonders if he and Maris are meant to be together and he asks Frasier for his opinion. Touched that Niles would ask him such an important question, Frasier ponders the deceptively simple question for days.

programme.title: Frasier: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Frasier decides to meet a woman who accidentally left a message on his answering machine.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to have spent his vacation with a supermodel.

programme.desc: Frasier and Niles compete to buy Martin the best birthday present. Frasier buys a huge TV set, while Niles manages to find Martin's old police horse. After the party, though, Frasier and Niles find Martin pondering the sadness of ageing.

programme.title: Frasier: Halloween
programme.desc: Niles hosts a costume party and Roz tells Frasier that she may be expecting a child.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: Movie: Playing Cupid

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest while Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Lawn Signs

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Happy Anniversary

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Opening Night
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to find a new purpose, while Moira must confront the harsh realities of local politics.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Throuple
programme.desc: David and Stevie must come to terms with their new relationship, while Alexis and Moira become anxious when they schedule a rare mother/daughter lunch.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: New Car
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira feign poverty in an attempt to get a deal on a used car, while David helps Stevie lay her great-aunt to rest.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Jennifer Dulos Story
programme.desc: Delving deeper into shocking stories of criminal deception.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Mom: The Disappearance of Jennifer Dulos
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Details the story of Jennifer Dulos, the wealthy, Connecticut mother-of-five who mysteriously vanished on May 24, 2019.

programme.title: Movie: Believe Me: The Lisa McVey Story
programme.desc: The disturbing true-story of Lisa McVey, who was abducted in 1984 but later released by her abuser. At 17, a teen rides bike home after working contemplating her suicide, only to find herself wanting to stay alive when abducted.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Ann Smart, who as abducted from her home in 2002 and held captive for nine-months before being rescued.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Movie: R.I.P.D.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Laffs Are Back

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: How to Save a Life

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fails, Falls, and Follie

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Masters of Disasters

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Behaviour

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Fools
programme.desc: Learn why playing with fire is still a bad idea, see who has the fastest Rubik's Cube hands underwater, and the latest on the dad bod craze that's taking over the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys use a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Modern Family: White Christmas
programme.desc: In an effort to have the picture-perfect white Christmas she's always dreamed of, Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains for the whole family to celebrate the holiday. Meanwhile, the family is preoccupied with their own agendas.

programme.title: Modern Family: Playdates
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have dinner plans with this great couple they met on vacation; the only problem is they never pick up the bill, so Claire insists Phil be strong this time and make them pay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings
programme.desc: Sick of having the ducklings around the house, Claire and the kids seize an opportunity to help expedite the ducks leaving the nest while Phil is off visiting Alex at college.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day
programme.desc: Before Claire officially takes over Jay's closet business, she decides she must get the house in order and make the family clean out the clutter; unfortunately, Phil and Luke can't bear to part with anything.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Party
programme.desc: Manny and Luke are in charge of babysitting Lily so that the adults can enjoy a day to themselves. Claire and Gloria have a lovely trip to the spa planned, Phil and Mitch nerd out at the movies and Jay and Cam go to a sports bar to watch the big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Modern Family: Promposal
programme.desc: With Closet-Con right around the corner, Claire is on high alert and convinced there is a mole in the company. Meanwhile, Phil goes vigilante when he and Gloria confront Auntie Alice for stealing her hot sauce recipe.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Dede is getting remarried, and Manny convinces the family to take the train up to her wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: Double Click
programme.desc: Claire can't seem to find the right time to fire one of her employees, while back at home Phil thinks he caught Luke with a girl in his bed, and no one seems to notice that Alex has moved back home for the summer.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: With All of My Children
programme.desc: Some of the most beloved cast members of the iconic soap opera 'All My Children' reunite to celebrate its 50th anniversary and reminisce about the show’s origins, most outrageous storylines, and series cliff-hanger that left the fans wanting more.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change
programme.desc: Khloè runs into some unexpected obstacles while exploring surrogacy. Scott worries that the family will drift apart now that the show is coming to an end. Kim is determined to figure out who is behind the satirical social media page NorisBlackBook.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up with the Kids
programme.desc: When Tristan realizes that Khloe is stressed about her living situation, he takes steps to make her feel more comfortable. Scott feels compelled to share some of his most sentimental moments from the show with his kids.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News
programme.desc: While planning an over-the-top birthday surprise for her mom, Kim receives some bad news about her legal studies that makes her question whether she is cut out to be a lawyer. Kourtney finds out that Kendall has been secretly returning all of her gifts.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family departs on one last family trip to Lake Tahoe where they relive some of their fondest memories from the show. Kim deals with some turbulence in her marriage.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family buries a time capsule to commemorate their years on Keeping Up. Kim updates the family on her future, Khloé must decide whether to move to Boston to be with Tristan, and Kourtney finally gives Scott some clarity about their romantic future.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan reunites with all of the families converging at home for Father's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blindsided
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts are going head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is running for senior class president against Manny. Meanwhile, Cam finds his star football player is moving away and makes a rash decision.

programme.title: Modern Family: Weathering Heights
programme.desc: Phil can't cover up his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate news segment for the local news. The day gets even better after meeting his 'weatherman' hero, Rainer Shine.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: Luke’s Halloween party isn’t the monster bash he dreamed of, and he is at risk of having the worst party of the year.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thanksgiving Jamboree
programme.desc: It's going to be a Thanksgiving jamboree at the Pritchett-Tucker home this year, and Cameron has spared no expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Alliance
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teen daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected. Meanwhile, Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dives Worth a Drive
programme.desc: Guy hunts down killer dives, including a nightclub in Cleveland that serves salmon BLTs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Real Deal Delivery
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are making recipes sent by DDD alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there's real deal barbecue from Los Angeles, wild Thai dishes out of Phoenix and a monster lasagna from Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven is stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint is loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Real Deal Delivery

programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares recipes that use her favourite good ingredients starting with good chocolate in her chocolate pecan meringue torte. Next, good maple syrup and lemon are turned into sublime side dishes including maple-roasted acorn squash.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Herbs All Ways
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favourite herbs and tips for using them to amp up the flavour of dishes. Rosemary, oregano and mint highlight her Pork Souvlaki with Radish Tzatziki and Pitas for a delectable, easy meal.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Pour on Some Summer
programme.desc: Summer sauces are the star of the menu, starting with Katie Lee's sweet and spicy grilled chicken and cucumber salad and Geoffrey Zakarian's seared scallops with a caper honey sauce.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All Greek to Me
programme.desc: It's a burger gift from the Greek gods. Michael Symon's Greek heritage is on full display as he makes a grilled Lamb Burger with Tzatziki. His wife, Liz, concocts an Ouzo Spritz with pickled watermelon rind that pairs perfectly with Michael's burger.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: California Cooking
programme.desc: The sun is shining, and Ree Drummond is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta, vibrant cauliflower tacos with avocado crema and divine roasted grape and ricotta toasts.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything Wildcard
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers wildcard questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares an over-the-top good seared rib eye Banh Mi Vietnamese sandwich and an awesome chicken quinoa bowl with roasted corn salsa.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: The Kitchen heads outdoors as the hosts get their grill ready for spring and put some grilling gadgets to the test in a Tool Takedown.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Brunch Spread
programme.desc: It's time for brunch in Michael Symon's backyard. He makes homemade bagels with poppy seeds and sesame seeds, and his wife, Liz, whips up homemade cream cheese to go with them. Michael also makes planked everything bagel-spiced salmon.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: A Bowl of Lemons
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives his friends lemons, and they make anything but lemonade. Eric Greenspan stirs a citrusy Tom Collins, Antonia Lofaso lightens things up with puffy pavlova with lemon curd whipped cream, and Marc Murphy makes fried calamari with lemon aioli.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag and Jet Tila are ready to compete, as they pit Italian chef Fabio Mura against Miami chef Nicole Votano. It's up to them to decide who has the chops to bring Bobby Flay down in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Age Is Just a Number
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson is teaming up with Kimberly Schlapman to add one more award to her mantle: the Beat Bobby Flay Award!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Won't Like Him When He's Angry
programme.desc: Austrian chef Daniel Angerer is out to prove that his last win over Bobby Flay was no fluke, while Jersey restaurateur Jamie Knott hopes to become the new star of Bobby's nightmares.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Fiddle Around!
programme.desc: Fine-dining master chef Geoff Lazlo faces off against Cincinnati legend chef Daniel Wright, and both want to see Bobby Flay go up in smoke. Chef Josh Capon is joined by actress Teri Hatcher to make sure the chefs have the firepower to win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop of the Mornin' to Ya
programme.desc: There's expertise in spades when Chopped regular Amanda Freitag and digital darling Laura Vitale arrive in Bobby Flay's arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Siblings Matt and Lisa Storch take their rivalry to the next level when they challenge each other for a chance to try and torch Bobby Flay. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Damaris Phillips are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery, a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert, a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Twisted Relationship
programme.desc: A North Carolina storekeeper is haunted by a deadly prophecy, a smallpox victim fears he'll be buried alive after he's mistaken for dead in New Orleans and an Atlanta police station becomes a battleground between a killer and a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Spirits in the Air
programme.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house, a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio and a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Lisa's Angels
programme.desc: Lisa and the SUR staff take part in the Gay Pride Parade. Things turn ugly when Stassi finds out that Jax is back to his womanizing ways. Kristen finds new evidence about Tom and Ariana's relationship and confronts them.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Kiss and Tell
programme.desc: Kristen tries to clear the air with Stassi, but reveals that Tom Schwartz may be cheating on Katie. Katie interrogates the SUR staff about Schwartz's infidelity and discovers they know more than expected. Lisa hosts the '50 Gay Mayors' event at PUMP.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: New Girl, Old Grudges
programme.desc: With Gay Pride coming up, Lisa hires a new hostess named Vail, who immediately catches the attention of Jax. Stassi slams Tom Schwartz for remaining friends with Jax, but Schwartz believes her anger is just a grudge against her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves on a TV game show answering questions.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Took You So Long?
programme.desc: Captain Lee grills the crew as he tries to find out the cause of the galley fire and the inquiry leads to a contentious dismissal. This leads Rocky to take a dramatic, unauthorized dive off the boat leaving her crew-mates shorthanded and angry.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: 'The Real Housewives of Atlanta's' Cynthia Bailey and Claudia Jordan, along with family and friends, board the 'Eros' to celebrate Cynthia's birthday, but bad weather keeps them stuck at the dock. The crew works extra hard to pamper their guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Frustrations mount for Rocky over her job and Eddie. Meanwhile, Ben wows charter guests with a steakhouse-style dinner, yet his breakfast dishes fail to measure up, and Rocky divulges details about a secret affair.

programme.title: Below Deck: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: The final dinner of the charter season is imperiled when Ben suffers a severe injury and he’s forced to rely on Rocky for help. Captain Lee talks to Connie about her yachting future, and the crew's bonfire gets extremely tense.

programme.title: Unspeakable Crime: The Killing of Jessica Chambers: A Dying Declaration
programme.desc: As the trial unfolds, shocking testimony from first responders reveals that Jessica uttered a dying declaration that may spawn new leads.

programme.title: Unspeakable Crime: The Killing of Jessica Chambers: Racial Divide: An Issue of Black and White?
programme.desc: As the defense continues to poke holes in the prosecution's theory, many wonder if the right man is on trial, all while racial tensions in the town are thrust into the national spotlight.

programme.title: Unspeakable Crime: The Killing of Jessica Chambers: Tapes and Towers: The Prosecution's Theory
programme.desc: The prosecution presents its star witnesses including intense interrogation tapes and complex cell phone data that give the trial an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: The jurors hear closing arguments and as deliberations begin, the judge's instructions appear to confuse the jury and create total chaos in the courtroom.

programme.desc: What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent
programme.desc: When the police are called to diffuse a rowdy crowd at Mr. Burns' estate, one of the officers recognizes priceless stolen paintings on the walls, and the maniacal billionaire is taken downtown for questioning.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Surveil, With Love
programme.desc: A bomb squad mistakenly blows up Homer's unattended gym bag, releasing radiation into the city, and authorities react by suspending civil liberties. Wiggum and his men install surveillance cameras around Springfield and round up suspected terrorists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Bob Next Door
programme.desc: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour, Walt, is his archenemy Sideshow Bob disguised and back for revenge. But when Marge tries to convince Bart otherwise by taking him to visit the state penitentiary, a disturbing truth is revealed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead

programme.desc: Shocking new evidence has convinced some of the world's greatest physicists that the universe is a hologram, and using cutting-edge technology, they investigate the secrets of black holes and space-time to build the case for this game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Asteroid Apocalypse
programme.desc: Investigating the apocalyptic consequences of an asteroid strike, and using cutting-edge science, experts are racing to develop tech that can destroy these deadly killers before they unleash Armageddon.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War of the Galaxies

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Curse of the White Dwarf
programme.desc: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Next Supernova
programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Alien Worlds
programme.desc: An explosion in the discovery of exoplanets is challenging everything we know about our universe; experts use cutting-edge astronomy to investigate these mysterious alien worlds and how they defy the laws of physics.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Home is where the heart is and a killer lurks.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Officer Down
programme.desc: The small town of Higginson, Arkansas, only has two full-time police officers. When one of them is brutally gunned down on duty, everyone in the community wants answers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Jilted and Jealous
programme.desc: Jealousy can become an obsessive trait and a deadly trait.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Country Killer
programme.desc: Rodeo start Matt Allen finds southern comfort in the arms of country girl Elsie Wells. Until she finds his best friend-and they all discover a thick gumbo of trouble.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Married to the Devil
programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Redrum: Triangle of Death
programme.desc: When a recently divorced factory worker was found stabbed to death in his home after a violent struggle, the investigators discovered a lovesick motive.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Guess I've Got No Conscience
programme.desc: A woman's body is found strangled and partially nude off the side of a Connecticut country road. Investigators apprehend a suspect in her murder, only to discover he's a prolific serial killer - responsible for the rape and the murder of eight women.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: New Beginnings, Violent Endings
programme.desc: When Dorian Bluford moves to a new city to be closer to a friend his family doesn't know, he's brutally murdered stabbed 37 times in the chest.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A college student working as a radio station intern far from home is murdered, launching a long and frustrating investigation that leaves family and police on the brink of hopelessness until forensic genealogy leads to a man on the run for decades.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Mother of It All
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Stop That Spinosaurus! / The Spookasaurus
programme.desc: A rampaging dinosaur threatens to cause havoc. When Jon gets spooked by a campfire story about a legendary dinosaur, he doesn't want to admit it to Miguel and Min.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Small Wonder
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Pikwik Pack: Faster Faster/You Don't Say
programme.desc: Professor Hoot's latest invention Mia Robot helps the team finish their chores and deliver a package; Professor Hoot loses his voice while on a nature hike.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: It's Always Cool
programme.desc: Fancy Nancy and Bree learn it's always cool to be polite and have good manners.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Legend of El Tomahto / Interplanetary Kickle Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Nanny announces that she's making tomato salad, the Muppet Babies volunteer to pick the last tomato from her garden! Gonzo's determined to win Interplanetary Kickle Ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cupcake's Birthday/ Dog Wash Derby
programme.desc: When the plans for Cupcake’s birthday go awry, Rufus suggests that they find the perfect gift for her instead. Bob has too much to do at Playcare, so the pups gear up to help!

programme.title: The Chicken Squad: The Squirrel Next Door/ The Stakeout Mistake
programme.desc: The Chicken Squad helps out a squirrel who's just moved to the neighborhood. When Captain Tully takes the Squad on their first stakeout, the chicks get impatient.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: Toon Bops: The Potbelly Pig Song
programme.desc: The adventures of a mischievous potbelly pig popping up all over town to dance with his friend Boy.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night
programme.desc: Muffin plays the game of library her way. Mum, Dad and Bingo must pass Swim School. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Ballad of Big Jon/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Jon learns his small deeds make him a hero, and Min and Jane learn about kindness when they're chased by wild raptors.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Clover's Tiny Problem/ Tango's BFF
programme.desc: Clover realizes Min won't replace him with any dinosaur. Then, Tango becomes attached to a triceratops and doesn't want her to rejoin her herd.

programme.title: The Chicken Squad: Chicken Squad to the Rescue/ A Speedy Exit
programme.desc: The Squad must learn to work together to rescue a stranded puppy. The Squad gets carried away while upgrading their headquarters.

programme.title: The Chicken Squad: The Natural/ A Dirty Job
programme.desc: Little Boo gets overconfident during Captain Tully's training activities. Sweetie's enthusiasm about Dr. Dirt's work causes problems in the lab.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Duck, Duck Geese!/ Shhhhh!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Wheelchair Pals / Super-Duper-Stitious Day!

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men

programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Casey Anthony

programme.title: Movie: Drew Peterson: Untouchable
programme.desc: A police officer, who has been married three times, lands a girl half his age. While his relationship with his new girl blossoms, he is undergoing a bitter divorce from his third wife, who unexpectedly ends up dead.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: A truck driver, who, during his work travels across the country, kills numerous women and hauntingly leaves a confession of each murder with a scrawled happy face as cryptic evidence of his crime.

programme.title: Movie: Revenge Delivered
programme.desc: A dark truth comes to light when an obstetrician suspects that one of her student residents is secretly the vengeful daughter of someone from her past.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: The Shocking Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: DC Madam: The Woman Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: 'DC Madam' Debroah Jean Palfrey was found dead under suspicious circumstances after threatening to expose the identities of those on her client list.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Matter of Life or Seth
programme.desc: Brutal heat punishes Suzanne as she makes a new start after leaving Seth. Barehanded Killer Bulent takes on a monitor lizard. A potential snake attack could be Seth's first African food win. A tribe plans a move that could upend the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Keep Your Frenemies Close
programme.desc: Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, the win creates tension. A desperate Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole. Seth is open to a partnership but Bulent remains solo and quickly gets a major food win in Seth's backyard.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Third Times the Harm
programme.desc: Wes and team get their third big-game kill, but the victory quickly becomes an unexpected and very dangerous medical situation. A broiling heat wave pushes temperatures to 130 degrees and tests Bulent's ability to survive solo.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Crossbow and a Cross To Bear
programme.desc: Desperate for food, Gwen and Sarah lead the charge to build a crossbow in the bush while Ryan feels the pressure to provide. When new wildlife moves into his camp, Bulent is pushed to the edge. Medics remove a survivalist from the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished But Not Broken
programme.desc: With extraction just days away, one survivalist goes against the group, is banished and must try to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah deploy crossbows as they push for one last kill. A deadly snake could end someone's challenge on Day 40.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Trucking Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 aren't feeling confident when the Mudders of Mayhem challenge them to a race. Jimmy could lose to a kid half his age and Spiker makes a huge bet that may cost the team big time.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Car Crash, Flying Bull Rider
programme.desc: A helicopter crashes into a Navy destroyer; a tornado rips through an Iowa farm; an explosion tears a shopping mall apart and a rodeo bull flings his rider in the air.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Pow Stick!

programme.desc: Mark Few and Larry Larson are chasing silvers in saltwater on the Perseverance.

programme.desc: George targets bottom and pelagic species off Marathon, Florida Keys.

programme.desc: Rush and Key West buddy Dane test tackle, while Ali targets yellowtail in California.

programme.desc: Paul Ross joins Tom and Rich to target snook and redfish around islands and the Everglades.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Islamorada Backcountry
programme.desc: Capt. Steve Teijea guides Rick through the backcountry of the Florida Keys.
