programme.desc: With the Bairdi fishery open for the first time in years, Josh and John on the Time Bandit reopen the Phil Harris playbook and ask Casey and Sig to help tank the fleetwide quota. Wild Bill bets on Nick McGlashan to turn the tide for the Summer Bay.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Time Bandit and Cornelia Marie race for the last spot at the cannery, but as word spreads of an emergency shutdown of the Bairdi fishery, they return to the grounds as Sig Hansen rallies his fellow captains with an unconventional plan.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Back to the Future Part 1
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd set off on an unprecedented adventure : traveling across the country from Tinseltown to Texas and Massachusetts to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future and give it to Michael J. Fox.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: EJ's Ball and Pain
programme.desc: A brutal injury threatens EJ's challenge and manhood. Jeff and Steven are stalked by a territorial black bear. Rylie, Matt and Ryan land their second huge win of the challenge. Max and Gary plan a risky raid of an active beehive.

programme.title: Germophobia: Germophobia
programme.desc: Washing hands 80 times a day, wrapping car seats in plastic, making guests wear hazmat suits and roasting in a hot sauna to kill bacteria before sex are just some of the ways Brian, Keshius and Toni navigate life with their Germophobia.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90 per cent of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
programme.desc: Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head. Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being a Dadzilla
programme.desc: Alyssa calls her father 'Dadzilla,' and his opinions rule the day. Wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress. When Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad 'Papazilla' demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!
programme.desc: Amanda's biggest challenge is finding a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love. Hillary searches for a specific gown her late grandmother adored. Macie already found her dream dress, but now Grandma wants to see her in something different.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I AM Bride-Yonce'
programme.desc: Bride Lauren loves dressing sexy, but she also wants a gown that will still feel bridal. Ali wants to look like Beyoncé on her big day, so she'll need a sexy gown with tons of sparkle. Blair bought a very sexy dress and hopes her grandmother approves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Rainbow Unicorn Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colourful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding, but her mother does not approve. Bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day. Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sasha Dress
programme.desc: 'High School Musical' star Corbin Bleu joins his fiancée, Sasha, to find her dream dress. Bride Katie wants a classic ball gown, but her fiancé would like something sexier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Extreme Sisters: We Want a Fairytale
programme.desc: Christina tries to mend her relationship with Jessica before she drops some big news. Ron puts his plan to get Patrix's mind off Orlando into action. Brittany and Briana struggle to separate from each other on solo dates with their husbands.

programme.title: Extreme Sisters: Us Two and Someone New
programme.desc: Jessica hits rock bottom with her sister, Christina. Anna and Lucy get some bad news. Ron finds Patrix a date. Brittany and Briana learn the gender of Briana's baby. While moving back in with her mom, Baylee is welcomed with an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Biography: 'Macho Man' Randy Savage

programme.title: The Cube: The World's Toughest Gameshow
programme.desc: Dwyane Wade introduces The Cube, 15 square feet of steel-edged plexiglass where simple tasks become epic challenges! The teams have 9 lives to win 7 games in order to beat The Cube for a chance to walk away with $250,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter
programme.desc: Andy Richter challenges the chefs to recreate the delectable fish and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame

programme.desc: The boys help save a local magic shop. Plus, The Great Ramsini hits the barbershop.

programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious Lily moment during her recent dance recital. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.desc: The members of Girls5eva, a late '90s girl group, reconnect after their big hit is sampled by an up-and-coming rapper, Lil Stinker.

programme.title: Girls5eva: D'Wasg
programme.desc: Girls5eva struggles to make a first move. Scott deals with a package Wickie sent from Los Angeles.

programme.title: Girls5eva: Alf Musik
programme.desc: Girls5eva tracks down their old songwriter, Alf Musik. Dawn questions if she wants a second baby.

programme.title: Girls5eva: Carma
programme.desc: Summer's husband, Kev, is home from Tampa. Dawn follows the Dolly method to write a hit. Wickie dates a younger guy.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Comin' from All Over the Map
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are cooking up recipes sent by Triple-D alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there's gangster gorditas comin' from Phoenix, Korean chicken wings out of Denver and a steak specialty from a Jewish deli in Houston, TX.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Guy checks out the hot spots in Hawaii for food and visits an authentic luau.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub and More
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the real deal in bar foods and some Salvadorian classics.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Chop Chop
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister, Beth, love cooking competition shows so they decide to hold one in their own kitchen in this new episode. Beth puts together a mystery basket for Trisha, who uses the ingredients to make an appetizer, main course and dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tailgating
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes her family out to the ballgame! With help from her sister, Beth, and nephew, Bret, Trisha makes "Go Dawgs!" greens, baked chicken tenders and easy blueberry pie bars.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Too Hot to Cook
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her buddy Faith Ford love to cook and test out recipes. Valerie decides to keeps things cool with a deliciously decadent lobster club sandwich and savory refrigerator pickles.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating Wolf's Music
programme.desc: Valerie is celebrating her son Wolf's music with friends, family and his favourite home-cooked meal. The menu includes cedar plank salmon with grilled cherry tomatoes, brown butter sautéed spinach with lemon and mini crab cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Competing Breakfasts
programme.desc: Ree's making Ladd's favorite slap-up platter, the Farmer's Breakfast, with over easy fried eggs, a slab of honey-glazed ham, fried sausage and bacon.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Hacks
programme.desc: Ree is testing delicious ideas for kitchen hacks to up her breakfast game. There's a shortcut to the divine with chocolate chip hazelnut pancakes, and she's going experimental with a crazy omelet in a bag.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: New Favorites
programme.desc: For Ree Drummond, it's out with the old and in with new favorites that are all quick and easy. She makes over a cowboy classic, Flank Steak with Herb Sauce and Three-Cheese Waffle Hash Browns.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Take-Along
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares delicious eats to take along to parties, get-togethers and cookouts, starting with a grilled potato salad and pinwheels three ways. Then she whips up everyone's favorite queso with grilled veggies and quick and easy fruit tarts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Parents' Payback
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making dinner for her parents to say thanks for all their help. The menu includes knoephla sausage hot dish, sweet and smoky roasted squash hummus with Bernie-inspired veggie focaccia for dunking and buttery kitty cookies for dessert.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: I'm Very Fondue of You
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts a fondue party for her friends, actors Melissa Peterman and John Brady. Her menu includes four cheese fondue with assorted dippers, everyday sheet pan roasted veggies and chocolate dessert fondue with fried bananas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Cheese, Please!
programme.desc: Trisha and a friend visit a local cheese shop and make dishes with their picks. Their menu includes French onion soup, goat cheese fondue and roast beef and camembert Panini with arugula aioli.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Reunion With a Song
programme.desc: After being on the road performing for more than three years, Trisha Yearwood is ready to spend some time with her family. She throws a family reunion to catch up and share some great food. Her menu includes grilled potato salad and back cheeseburgers.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Spin on Spring
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts spin the Seasonal Wheel of Produce to create recipes showcasing their favorite spring ingredients, including asparagus and rhubarb, in delicious new ways. Chrissy Teigen's mom, Pepper, stops by with the scoop on her new cookbook.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: America's Next Chefs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts four up-and-coming chefs to the ultimate Flavortown test to crown America's Next Chef. First, Guy has the chefs flip the ingredients from an old-fashioned Waldorf salad into a modern dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bacon Masters

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Triplets
programme.desc: Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum. Chandler must step up during the croc show, while Robert gets hands-on with the zoo's newest members: three adorable tiger cubs.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Steve
programme.desc: Bindi swims alongside whale sharks, assisting with research efforts on the world's latest and least understood fish. Robert work to save an echidna that's tightly trapped under a fridge. Terri joins a closeup exam on a grizzly.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Confessions of the Crocodile Hunter
programme.desc: This exclusive Animal Planet special features never-before-seen footage and candid interviews with Steve Irwin.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sunk in Seconds
programme.desc: On Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Morgan Inman and Austin Cryer discover that a brave citizen rescued passengers from a sunken boat. A suspected poisoning could be the cause of numerous dead doves, and alligators are found on school property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lake Showdown
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Randy Sovall and Sean Reneau deal with the aftermath. Game Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite, and hooks a gator residing in a family's pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunter Games
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mike Boone and James Noxon question a felon suspected of illegally hunting with a firearm. Hunters are tracked down and interrogated after a suspicious sighting on private property, and a late-night shrimp boat search uncovers illegal fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Blood Evidence
programme.desc: Game Wardens Morgan Inman and Justin Eddins interrogate a group of hunters suspected of trespassing and theft. Lifeless ducks are found floating mysteriously in Port Aransas, and wardens hit the water before dawn to bust clandestine shrimpers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: No License to Kill
programme.desc: Foolhardy speedsters run afoul of wardens on a nighttime stakeout mission. Game Warden Mike Boone investigates reckless gunfire endangering life and property, and Game Warden Chelsea Bailey crosses paths with a wanted man during a routine safety check.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: Game Warden Randolph McGee assesses a major gasoline spill in the local water system then tracks down a trash dumping culprit. Young jet skiers are confronted, and Game Warden Mike Boone helps relocate an alligator circling a dock.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Riders
programme.desc: Game Wardens Matt Kiel and Michael Serbanic race to confront reckless jet skiers wreaking havoc at a boat ramp. A rogue ATV rider tries to lie his way out of a trespassing charge, and a crabber turns hostile when caught without a fishing license.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bracing for Impact
programme.desc: On the Gulf of Mexico, a routine inspection turns treacherous for Game Warden Carmen Rickel and the Marine Tactical Operations Group. Warden Kyle Hadley wrangles a rattlesnake found in a home, and underaged boaters are busted for alcohol on deck.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Actions Have Consequences
programme.desc: Game Warden James Cummings arrives at the scene of a domestic dispute, only to discover the man has a warrant out for his arrest. During water patrols, a fisherman is caught empty handed, and a couple with their baby are kayaking without life jackets.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Happens in the Hot Tub Stays in the Hot Tub
programme.desc: Tensions continue to mount between Trevor and the rest of the deck team. Kelley starts getting close to a flirty, single charter guests and Kate and Ben clash in the galley. Meanwhile, Sierra is having a difficult time adjusting to life on the Valor.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hair Models and Filthy Martinis
programme.desc: As the crew readies the boat for another charter, Kelley makes a decision on how to proceed with Trevor. The new charter guests prove to be a handful with a very pampered poodle and a beach clambake that sends Ben’s stress level into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Below Deck: The One Where the Charter Guests Almost Die

programme.desc: Kelley is angry with Sierra after he finds out how she treated a member of the deck team. Emily enjoys a night out with Ben while things get very heated between Kate and the exterior crew. Kyle takes Sierra out on a date, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Sea Was Angry
programme.desc: The Valor crew welcomes aboard a group of psychics and their famous friends, while Ben and Kate have it out over yet another miscommunication. Emily is upset after Ben embarrasses her in front of a charter guest. An unexpected wind storm hits.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rocked and Loaded
programme.desc: Country rocker Andy Ross wants Danny to build the world's most patriotic muscle car ever made. Will a Second Amendment-inspired hot rod Corvette do the trick? Meanwhile, Roli blackmails Horny Mike into teaching him how to airbrush.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mustang Memories
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to restore a family heirloom '67 Ford Mustang. He wants to make it a world-class, one-of-a-kind street machine, so he visits the home of the baddest Mustangs on Earth for inspiration: the Shelby Heritage Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Count of Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Danny must give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients and is counting on his team to get the job done in one week. Meanwhile, Ryan and Mike go for the ride of their lives in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dune Buggy Blues
programme.desc: Danny has found and bought a replacement for his beloved Dune Buggy 'Sparkles.' As the guys are turning it into the ultimate '70s beach fantasy, Mike convinces Ryan to take it for a quick joy ride that ends anything but joyful.

programme.title: Counting Cars: '68 Killer Camaro
programme.desc: A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment.

programme.title: Top Gear: Cobra Attack
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood and Tanner Foust give the soon to be replaced Dodge Viper SRT a fitting send off by pitting it against a Cobra attack helicopter through the streets of Griffin, Georgia.

programme.title: Top Gear: Blind Drift
programme.desc: Tanner races his favorite cut price sports car against two extreme skiers down a mountain. Rutledge finds out if Aston Martin has solved a horsepower problem in its new model.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Special Edition: The Freemason Factor
programme.desc: Learn about the Freemasons, a secret society that that were highly influential in the founding of the United States.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Special Edition: The Secret Space Program
programme.desc: In 2002, Gary McKinnon claimed that he had evidence that a secret military space program existed. It's possible that the U.S. has a greater presence in space than publicly known.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Special Edition: Protecting the President
programme.desc: The United States has suffered the assassination of four presidents and two failed attempts. Learn about many more that never reached the public, and just how far the nation goes to protect the commander-in-chief.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Special Edition: FBI vs MLK
programme.desc: In 1962, Martin Luther King Jr. criticized J. Edgar Hoover and the FBI for refusing to prosecute white supremacists. Hoover took the comments personally, and ordered his bureau to investigate King.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Godfathers of Fast Food

programme.desc: Ava and Noah work together to put on a puppet show for the PeeWeeWaka campers while Destiny helps Lou prepare for an important camp inspection.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Look Who's Squawking

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Resolution/ Winter Greens
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Cricket insists on helping Gloria complete her resolution of approaching her long-time crush, Kevin. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.

programme.desc: Luz feels guilty about Eda losing her powers, so she sets sail in search of a lucrative bounty to help the Owl House.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma

programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Execution Enigma

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: German foreign exchange student and soccer player, Diren Dede’s dream of studying in America came true when he began his junior year at a Montana high school. When he decides to play a reckless teenage game, the consequences turn deadly.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Comic Book Murder
programme.desc: Barbara George was murdered in her comic store on Friday the 13th. The case went cold and her husband moved away, starting a new life with a new wife. But then there was a new prosecutor with an old connection to the case, and he wanted it solved.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young mother and her son are found dead in a house fire. Police suspected foul play. A confession led to a guilty verdict, but what really happened during the interrogation. This is an extraordinary look inside the interview room.

programme.desc: Investigators suspect foul play when they discover a mysterious body lying dead along a lonely stretch of New Mexico highway. But the bizarre trail of evidence only deepens the dark enigma surrounding a seemingly well-respected family man.

programme.title: Dateline: The Secrtes of Cottonwood Creek
programme.desc: During a family weekend away at a Colorado cabin, an afternoon hike ends with a tragic drowning. It would take more than five years and hundreds of pieces of evidence to try and solve the mystery.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: There are unexpected outcomes for both families when an infestation at the nursery burrow forces the Whiskers to make a risky move with their youngest pups. Meanwhile heavily-pregnant Flint Lockwood leads Hakuna Matata in search of a new home.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.desc: The Red Center of Australia is one of the most inhospitable environments on Earth yet it is filled with wildlife. The secret to Australia's diversity is its rainforest past.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef's size is revealed as a mosaic of environments. However, scale isn't the only success of this micro world. The reef exists in nutrient poor waters, which on the face of it, is too poor to support all this life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Monster Black Holes

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis

programme.desc: Find out how sleeper rigs, pecans, steel pulleys, and acetate eyewear are made.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Sister's Loss
programme.desc: In the suburbs of central Ohio, a woman is found stabbed to death in her kitchen after she fails to show up for work. When a family heirloom is discovered during the investigation, the victim's sister is able to help detectives solve the case.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Fear
programme.desc: The body of a 74-year-old woman is found bludgeoned to death, the gruesome discovery sends shockwaves across the community. Suspicion and paranoia take control. Then a young girl vanishes, and her case exposes sordid secrets hidden for decades.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: American Cartel: Shots Fired
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Burbank, the murder of a police officer sparks an unprecedented manhunt and reveals clues that a local street gang might be connected to Mexico's most dangerous drug cartels.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Ghost
programme.desc: As the manhunt intensifies, the realization grows that the Vineland Boyz gang is more violent, more sophisticated, and stealthier than anyone had previously imagined. Decisions are made that will change the face of law enforcement forever.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: What began as the search to find Officer Matt Pavelka's killer quickly reveals a web of narcotics and violence that stretches across America, has infiltrated local government, and whose roots run all the way to El Chapo Guzman's Sinaloa Cartel.

programme.title: American Cartel: Shots Fired
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Burbank, the murder of a police officer sparks an unprecedented manhunt and reveals clues that a local street gang might be connected to Mexico's most dangerous drug cartels.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Ghost
programme.desc: As the manhunt intensifies, the realization grows that the Vineland Boyz gang is more violent, more sophisticated, and stealthier than anyone had previously imagined. Decisions are made that will change the face of law enforcement forever.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: What began as the search to find Officer Matt Pavelka's killer quickly reveals a web of narcotics and violence that stretches across America, has infiltrated local government, and whose roots run all the way to El Chapo Guzman's Sinaloa Cartel.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Lipstick Love Triangle
programme.desc: Marcela and her girlfriend Kimberlyn move to Las Vegas seeking adventure and a new life together. But when they meet a beautiful woman named Tzatzi, their world is turned upside down and all three end up moving in together, with tragic consequences.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Lover's Roulette
programme.desc: Unhappily married Jim Durgan starts an affair behind his wife Kristin's back. But Kristin is a compulsive gambling addict - and when Jim reconciles with her, her addiction plunges them into a terrifying downward spiral which ends in murder.

programme.title: True Conviction: Family Under Fire
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania family is decimated when masked men ambush them at home with guns and crude bombs, killing a mom and her daughter. The shell-shocked family points the finger at one of their own, but lack of evidence stalls the case for 30 agonizing years.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Hundred-Mile Murder
programme.desc: Miles City, Montana, holds its breath while police search for missing husband and father Marty Etchemendy. As they race to find Marty alive and track down those who ripped him from his family, an air of evil permeates an abandoned car 100 miles from town.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Sable-Eyed Beauty
programme.desc: When a body found dumped in a gritty Brooklyn neighborhood is later identified as criminal justice student Imette St. Guillen, detectives must retrace her final hours at a Manhattan bar to catch her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Move Out
programme.desc: Kiana Marshall, her brother Corey, and their friend Alexis are murdered. Now, bodycam and CCTV capture the hunt for their insane killer. Twisted tales lead detectives on a wild goose chase, but the killers are revealed and must face the consequences.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Circle of Friends
programme.desc: The slaying of a young mother and her family provide detectives with a chilling link to another murder gone cold. Now, they must work fast to make an arrest before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched

programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, AL, their forever home. The couple hunts for a bargain and lands the perfect place in need of big-time renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Mathews, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple hunts for a new forever home near the beach in Mathews, VA. They find a house that could be perfect for their family of four but it's a fixer-upper and their budget is tight.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blacksmith Breakroom
programme.desc: The crew build a pioneer blacksmith shop made from reclaimed beams, barnwood and rafters to serve as their office breakroom. Mark helps set up the frame, then a local blacksmith installs the forge and gives the guys an anvil lesson.

programme.desc: Ali hits the ground running in Boulder at a diner with pancakes so manly, only a chef who moonlights as a strong man could make them. Ali then seeks out some of the most authentic Chinese noodles found on the West Coast.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Old Town Grub
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Alexandria, VA: for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack! Ali kicks things off in style with a guilt free southern fried chicken biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Birmingham Magic
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and 35 bucks to find the best deals in Birmingham.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Rockin' Deals in Memphis

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mealin' and Dealin' In Michigan

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: St. Louis: Pig Snouts and Paddlefish
programme.desc: Andrew comes to St. Louis, a city where the food reflects the diversity of the neighbourhoods and the people who live there.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts, where the fresh local catch is delivered to restaurants each day.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Best of Beef
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern travels the globe in search of the best beef dishes. He devours mind-blowing barbecue in Austin, TX, a massive porterhouse steak in Brooklyn, NY, asado in Argentina and wagyu grill in Japan.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starstruck/ Camping Trip
programme.desc: When Star's biggest hero Mina Loveberry, a rogue magic-wielder from Mewni, loses her mojo for battle, Star attempts to help her get it back. Later, King Butterfly pays a surprise visit to Star during the Diaz family camping trip.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starsitting/ On the Job
programme.desc: When Star and Marco are in charge of watching Buffrog's tadpoles, the duo's babysitting styles clash. Later, Buffrog has to complete an important mission in order to care for his kids.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Goblin Dogs/ By the Book
programme.desc: Star and her friends wait in the longest food truck line ever for the universe's best hot dog, the Goblin Dog. Then, after an argument with Star, Glssaryk goes into hiding in a donut box. While they are occupied, Ludo plots to capture Star.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Game of Flags/ Girls' Day Out
programme.desc: Star competes in the Game of Flags at the Butterfly-Johansen family reunion against her mother's orders. Then, when Star is nominated as Mayor of Detention, she must help her constituents with their various problems.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Friendenemies/ Is Mystery
programme.desc: When Tom vies for Marco's company instead of Star's, Marco becomes suspicious. Later, worried about his tadpoles' futures, Buff Frog investigates the hole in the Mewman force field.

programme.title: The Good Lord Bird: Smells Like Bear

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Nude Beach

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pies and Tarts
programme.desc: Watch the remaining bakers undertake double-crusted fruit pies, English custard tart and phyllo pie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Frogs and Worms and Butterflies/ The Tree House

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Mega Mud Robot

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot Tracey's extra nice style rubs the desperate owner of an impounded car the wrong way. Ticket writers Brian and Danielle take their football rivalry to the streets. Sherry and Garfield push their luck while booting cars downtown.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A woman loses her cool at the impounded car lot after she lost the keys to her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot everyone helps an angry man keep his heartbeat steady; Carmen is pushed to the limit by an angry citizen; Jen becomes very energetic.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Police investigate an alleged theft at the impound lot. Rookie ticket writer Mike takes on South Street's drunken revelers. A wily man tries to escape Steve and Sherry's new high tech boot van.

programme.title: Intervention: Dorothy and Ivan
programme.desc: Neglected as a child by her alcoholic mother, Dorothy is now lost in a world of drugs, alcohol and self-inflicted cuts and burns. Ivan was once a rising rap star who got caught up in PCP addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Andrew
programme.desc: Andrew once dreamed of a military career, but now binges and purges up to 12 times a day.

programme.title: Intervention: Diana
programme.desc: In three years, Diana's alcoholism has gotten so bad that it has led her to being diagnosed with Wernicke-Korsakoff Syndrome, an alcohol-related brain disorder, which recently landed her in the hospital with temporary paralysis and a feeding tube.

programme.title: Intervention: Julie
programme.desc: Julie spends her son's child support money on beer and 90-proof peppermint schnapps. She has a failing liver and constant blackouts.

programme.title: Intervention: Latisha
programme.desc: A mother of three, Latisha will go to any lengths to feed her crack addiction, including prostitution.

programme.title: Hoarders: Eileen/ Judy
programme.desc: Eileen has destroyed her 3,200 sq. ft. home, and her relationships with her husband and six sons. Judy has blown most of her $1 million inheritance on her hoard, and has lost $30,000 worth of checks in her hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Vula/ Lisa
programme.desc: Vula hoards more than 30 sickly cats that have completely destroyed her home. Lisa, a teacher, has already lost one job by bringing her hoard from home to the classroom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Weekend Plans
programme.desc: Our three NSA interns watch a man blow up his own yard as two exotic dancers trash their locker room.
